name: Fudge Truffle Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces semisweet chocolate, melted and cooled
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325 degrees.
2. Line the bottom of your springform pan with waxed paper (or use any method you normally do to prevent sticking).
3. For the crust, mix the Oreos, melted butter, and sugar in a bowl and press the mixture onto the bottom of the pan.
4. For the filling, beat the cream cheese, sugar, and vanilla until blended. Add the eggs one at a time, mixing just until blended after each addition. Stir in the chocolate.
5. Pour the filling into the crust and bake for 60-65 minutes or until the center is almost set.
6. Place a pan of water in the oven to help keep the oven moist so the cheesecake is less likely to crack.
